_metadata.description: Common process fluid properties for quick-select in the UI. All values are approximate reference values; use actual laboratory or process data for final design.

units.Gf: Specific gravity relative to water at 15°C [-]
units.Pv_bar: Vapour pressure at reference temperature [bar absolute]

liquid_presets.name: Propane (C3H8)
liquid_presets.notes: High vapour pressure; flashing risk; use anti-static trim

liquid_presets.name: Ammonia (NH3)
liquid_presets.notes: Toxic; seal selection critical; refrigeration grade

liquid_presets.name: Heavy Fuel Oil (HFO)
liquid_presets.notes: High viscosity; Reynolds correction required; heat trace valve

liquid_presets.name: Light Crude Oil
liquid_presets.notes: API 40-45; flashing possible at high temperature

liquid_presets.name: 50% Ethylene Glycol/Water
liquid_presets.notes: Antifreeze; viscous at low temperature; Reynolds correction likely needed

liquid_presets.name: Light Petroleum Naphtha
liquid_presets.notes: High vapour pressure; fire hazard; earthed valve body required

gas_presets.name: Air (dry)
gas_presets.notes: Reference gas for N-factor derivation; Fγ = 1.000

gas_presets.name: Nitrogen (N2)
gas_presets.notes: Near-identical to air for sizing purposes; use for blanketing

gas_presets.name: Natural Gas (Methane dominant, ~97% CH4)
gas_presets.notes: Composition varies; use actual gas analysis for precise M and Z; Fγ = 0.936

gas_presets.name: Methane (CH4) — Pure
gas_presets.notes: Use Hall-Yarborough or Pitzer for Z at high pressure (>50 bar)

gas_presets.name: Hydrogen (H2)
gas_presets.notes: Lightest gas; very high sonic velocity; Z correction significant at > 100 bar; H2 embrittlement risk

gas_presets.name: Carbon Dioxide (CO2)
gas_presets.notes: Near-critical behaviour at typical operating conditions; Z can deviate significantly; Fγ = 0.921

gas_presets.name: Oxygen (O2)
gas_presets.notes: Fire/explosion hazard; oxygen-clean valve required; no hydrocarbon lubricants

gas_presets.name: Propane (C3H8) — Vapour
gas_presets.notes: Fγ = 0.807; low isentropic exponent — significant Y correction at high ΔP

gas_presets.name: Steam (H2O vapour) — Use STEAM phase instead
gas_presets.notes: Use FluidPhase = STEAM for accurate IF97 property lookup. This entry is for reference only.

steam_presets.name: Saturated Steam — Low Pressure (2–5 bar)
steam_presets.notes: Use IF97 for exact specific volume; Fγ ≈ 0.811

steam_presets.name: Saturated Steam — Medium Pressure (5–20 bar)
steam_presets.notes: Common process steam; T_sat from IF97

steam_presets.name: Superheated Steam — Medium Pressure (10–40 bar, 250–400°C)
steam_presets.notes: γ varies with T and P; always use IF97. Fγ ≈ 0.929

steam_presets.name: Superheated Steam — High Pressure (40–100 bar, 400–540°C)
steam_presets.notes: Power generation steam; Z correction may be needed near saturation line
